title: Artifact Bus Message
description: Canonical schema for a message carried on the spectrum-systems artifact bus. All cross-module artifact transfers must conform to this schema. Defined and owned by the orchestration layer; modules must not redefine or extend this schema locally.

message_id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact bus message.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for the artifact being transferred.

artifact_type.description: Canonical artifact type name. Must match a type declared in the target module's manifest inputs.

source_module.description: module_id of the module emitting the artifact. Must correspond to a real module manifest.

target_module.description: module_id of the module receiving the artifact. Must correspond to a real module manifest and must declare artifact_type in its inputs.

lifecycle_state.description: Lifecycle state of the artifact at the time of handoff. Must be a recognized state from lifecycle_states.json.

payload_ref.description: Reference pointer to the artifact payload (e.g., a storage path, artifact envelope ID, or run manifest reference). Must be non-empty.

contract_version.description: Version of the artifact contract governing this artifact type (semver).

schema_version.description: Version of the artifact-bus-message schema used by this message.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when this message was emitted by the orchestration layer.

run_id.description: Orchestration run identifier. Links this message to the originating pipeline run manifest.

lineage_ref.description: Lineage record identifier for the artifact being transferred. Required for all governed handoffs.

evaluation_ref.description: Optional evaluation result identifier linked to this handoff, when the artifact is being transferred as a result of an evaluation outcome.

work_item_ref.description: Optional work item identifier linked to this handoff, when the transfer was triggered by an action_required evaluation outcome.

metadata.description: Optional additional key-value metadata for this message. Must not include orchestration routing logic.
